song_name: I Wish It Would Rain Down

content:
[Intro]
      [ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Eb/G[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                                   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
   You know I never meant to see you again[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
But  I only passed by as a friend            yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                             [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
   All this time I stayed out of sight[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm7[/ch]                         [ch]Em/G[/ch]
I started wondering why?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Db[/ch]                      [ch]Ebsus[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]
Now I, Ohh now I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Ebsus[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain, rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Ebsus[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Db/F[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Oh  Yes I wish it would rain   on     meee[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                                     [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
You said you didn`t need  me in your life[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm7[/ch]                [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Ohh I guess you were right                 yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                                  [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Ooh  I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
But it looks like I did it again    yeah[/tab]

(Chorus)
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]                         [ch]Ebsus[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]
Now I,  now I know I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Ebsus[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain, rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Ebsus[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Ooh Girl I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Db/F[/ch]     [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Oh  Yes I wish it would rain   on        meee[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Db/Ab[/ch]      [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
   Though your hurt is gone,   mines hanging on, in -       side[/tab]
[tab]                                                           [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]
And I know, well its eating me through its eating me through  every night and day[/tab]

Im just waiting on    your      sign[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
`Cos I know, I know      I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]                                           [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
And I realise I let you down                         ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
   But I know in my heart of hearts[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/G[/ch]                                [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Db[/ch]                                 [ch]Ebsus[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]
 Now I,   Now I know I wish it would rain down........    down on me[/tab]

Just rain down oooooon me[/tab]
